entities.name: REFERENCE EVAPOTRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The amount of water transferred from the land to the atmosphere by evaporation and transpiration, serving as an indicator of atmospheric water demand.

entities.name: CLIMATIC FACTORS
entities.description: Environmental variables that control the rate of reference evapotranspiration.

entities.name: ELASTIC NET
entities.description: A machine learning regression model used to predict daily reference evapotranspiration.

entities.name: K-NEAREST NEIGHBOURS
entities.description: A machine learning algorithm used to predict daily reference evapotranspiration.

entities.name: MULTIVARIATE ADAPTIVE REGRESSION SPLINES
entities.description: A machine learning regression technique used to predict daily reference evapotranspiration.

entities.name: PARTIAL LEAST SQUARES REGRESSION
entities.description: A machine learning regression method used to predict daily reference evapotranspiration.

entities.name: RANDOM FOREST
entities.description: An ensemble machine learning method used to predict daily reference evapotranspiration.

entities.name: SUPPORT VECTOR REGRESSION
entities.description: A machine learning regression technique used to predict daily reference evapotranspiration.

entities.name: XGBOOST
entities.description: A gradient boosting machine learning algorithm used to predict daily reference evapotranspiration.

entities.name: CUBIST
entities.description: A rule-based machine learning model identified as the best performer for predicting reference evapotranspiration.

entities.name: PENMAN-MONTEITH METHOD
entities.description: The standard reference method used for the estimation of reference evapotranspiration.

entities.name: DAILY WEATHER PARAMETERS
entities.description: Daily meteorological data used as input features for machine learning models to predict evapotranspiration.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the study on reference evapotranspiration prediction was conducted.
